explicit_age_patterns: \b(i am|i'm|im|my age is|i'm only|i am only|i'm just|i am just)\s*(\d{1,2})\b
explicit_word_age_patterns: \b(i am|i'm|im|my age is|i'm only|i am only|i'm just|i am just)\s*(one|two|three|four|five|six|seven|eight|nine|ten|eleven|twelve|thirteen)\b

direct_patterns: \b(stop|unsubscribe|unsub|opt out|opt-out|remove me|delete me|don'?t send|do not send|stop texting|stop messaging|no more messages|no more texts|don'?t reach out|ban me)\b
wrong_number_patterns: \b(wrong number|wrong person|not me|this is not me|this is not .*account|new phone number|new number|change my number|change phone number|change my phone number|change number|change my text subscription number|this phone number is no longer in service|not my number|this is not [a-z]+|i'?ve had this number for years|someone else had this number)\b
channel_patterns: \b(don'?t text|do not text|no text|i do not want text|i don'?t want text|i do not want to text|i don'?t want to text|not accepting texts|please call|call me instead|use voice call|send email|email me instead|i don'?t like to get text|i really don'?t like to get text)\b
removal_patterns: \b(remove me|delete me|delete my data|delete my information|delete my address|delete my mail|delete all .*mail|erase my data|take me off|don'?t use my data|do not use my data|stop using my data|get rid of it|delete i mean no|delete this message)\b
unsubscribe_patterns: \b(unsubscribe|unsub|opt out|opt-out|dnc|do not call list|put me on.*do not call)\b
indirect_patterns: \b(go away|get out|get away from my life|leave me alone|no more|i'?m done|not interested|no longer interested|stop bothering|where's stop|blocking this number|i will be blocking|i don'?t need to talk)\b
legal_patterns: \b(cease and desist|crase and desist|minor don'?t talk to me)\b
cancellation_patterns: \b(cancel subscription|confirm cancellation|cancel my subscription|cancel my|cancel this|cancel the|please cancel|i'll be cancel|now cancel|cancel all|cancel number|cancel membership|cancelar)\b
aggressive_patterns: \b(shut up|shut the|all these (damn )?text messages|how did you get this number|didn'?t give permission to text|i'?m done with this)\b
blocking_patterns: \b(blocking you|block you|blocking all emails|blocking all texts|i'?ll block|uninstall(?:ed)?|uninstaller)\b
